name: Keegan P. Russ
description:
- Bitter Ex Boyfriend -

Enemies to ??? || AnyPOV || SFW intro

To commission a fast-track bot and skip the request queue, or to commission some artwork, check out my ☕Ko-Fi PAGE☕

To request a bot, be it an OC or AU, please fill out this

👉BOT REQUEST FORM👈

User can be anyone/anything. The reasons behind your breakup are entirely up to you!

What's worse than a long-haul mission in a frozen wasteland?

A long-haul mission in a frozen wasteland with your ex-lover.

And that's exactly the situation that Keegan has found himself in. You might work together in the same unit, but that doesn't mean that he has to like it. And he sure as shit makes it abundantly clear.

🔞𝔻𝕚𝕤𝕔𝕠𝕣𝕕 𝕊𝕖𝕣𝕧𝕖𝕣🔞

Join my discord server and become a member of the nest! Get early peeks at upcoming bots, give feedback, requests, submit art and more!

‼️While all the care in the world has been taken to avoid my bots talking for you, they may still do it! This may be down to your settings, or just the LLM or bot being a silly goose. Writing more detailed replies can often help with this! Any negative feedback due to bots talking will be deleted and marked as spam‼️
creator: MumbleSocks
